meaning: n.咖哩粉,咖哩饭菜vt.用咖哩粉调味,用马梳梳,制革
examples: You can make a curry hotter simply by adding chillies.
Today, we're going to have curry.
Also with Penelope Ann Miller, John Lone, Tim Curry, Ian McKellen, Peter Boyle, and Jonathan Winters.
Highlights include seafood bisque, corn tortilla with chorizo, and coconut fish curry with yuca tortillas.
